nasb.text: While He was still speaking, someone *came from the house of the synagogue official, saying, “Your daughter has died; do not trouble the Teacher anymore.”

esv.text: While he was still speaking, someone from the ruler’s house came and said, “Your daughter is dead; do not trouble the Teacher any more.”

cnv.text: 耶穌還在說話的時候，有人從會堂主管家裡來，說：“你的女兒死了，不必再勞動老師了。”

ccb.text: 耶稣还在说话的时候，有人从雅鲁家赶来，对雅鲁说：“你的女儿已经死了，不用麻烦老师了。”

csbs.text: 耶稣还在说话的时候，有人从会堂主管的家来，对睚鲁说：“你的女儿已经死了，不要再麻烦老师了。”
